user: What's the weather in Tokyo right now?
ref_output: Expected: a structured tool call, e.g. <|tool_call>call:get_current_weather{city: "Tokyo"}<tool_call|>. This probe corrects an earlier WRONG claim that DiffusionGemma 'is not a tool-calling model' — it has native function calling (Google model card) and emits the tool-call special tokens through the visual-server harness with tools merely inlined.
